---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new idea or capability for ADITYA OS"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "feature"]
assignees: []
---

### 💡 Feature Proposal
A clear and concise description of the feature you want to suggest.

### ❓ Problem Statement
Describe the problem this feature solves or how it helps your productivity/experience.

### 🛠️ Proposed Solution
Describe how you imagine this feature working within ADITYA OS (e.g. new workspace, new command, custom widget, voice prompt hook).

### 🎨 Design & Aesthetics
If applicable, suggest how this should look in the glassmorphism UI.

### ➕ Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
